preamble.title: alexandria/governance
preamble.description: On-chain governance for Alexandria: soulbound reputation tokens (CIP-68), DAO registry, elections, proposals, and skill-gated voting.

alexandria/completion/CompletionRedeemer.title: CompletionRedeemer
alexandria/completion/CompletionRedeemer.description: Mint/burn selector for the completion policy.

anyOf.title: MintCompletion
anyOf.description:
Mint a completion witness. Supplies the raw leaves so the
 validator can verify the Merkle root in the inline datum.

anyOf.title: BurnCompletion
anyOf.description:
Burn a previously-minted completion token. Used to clean up
 local UTxOs; does not affect the VC (which is already issued).

alexandria/types/DaoDatum.title: DaoDatum
alexandria/types/DaoDatum.description: Datum for a DAO's state UTxO at the registry validator.

fields.title: reputation_policy
fields.description: Policy ID of the reputation minting policy — governance reads these tokens

fields.title: membership_subjects
fields.description:
Subject IDs that qualify for membership (reputation tokens with these
 subject_ids in their asset name are eligible)

fields.title: min_membership_proficiency
fields.description: Minimum proficiency for basic DAO membership

fields.title: state_token_policy
fields.description: Policy ID of this DAO's state token

anyOf.title: CreateDao
anyOf.description: Create a new DAO (mints state token)

anyOf.title: UpdateDao
anyOf.description: Update DAO parameters (requires committee quorum)

anyOf.title: InstallCommittee
anyOf.description: Install new committee after election finalization

alexandria/types/DaoScope.title: DaoScope
alexandria/types/DaoScope.description: What part of the knowledge taxonomy a DAO governs.

anyOf.title: SubjectFieldDao
anyOf.description: Top-level DAO for a Subject Field (whitepaper §4.2.1)

anyOf.title: SubjectDao
anyOf.description: Sub-DAO for a single Subject (whitepaper §4.2.2)

fields.title: dao_state_token_policy
fields.description: DAO this election belongs to (state token reference)

fields.title: election_id
fields.description: Monotonically increasing election ID per DAO

fields.title: nominee_min_proficiency
fields.description: Minimum proficiency to be nominated (higher than voter threshold)

fields.title: reputation_policy
fields.description: Reputation policy ID (for verifying reference input tokens)

anyOf.title: OpenElection
anyOf.description: Committee opens a new election

anyOf.title: AcceptNomination
anyOf.description: A nominee accepts their nomination

anyOf.title: StartVoting
anyOf.description: Transition from nomination to voting phase

anyOf.title: FinalizeElection
anyOf.description: Finalize the election after voting ends

anyOf.title: Nominate
anyOf.description:
A member self-nominates (appends an accepted nominee). Appended last
 to preserve the constructor indices of the variants above.

fields.title: proposal_id
fields.description: Monotonically increasing proposal ID per DAO

fields.title: content_cid
fields.description: Content ID (BLAKE3 hash) of full proposal content

fields.title: voting_deadline
fields.description: POSIX ms when voting ends (set when Published)

anyOf.title: SubmitDraft
anyOf.description: Any DAO member submits a draft

anyOf.title: ApproveForVoting
anyOf.description: Committee approves draft for voting

anyOf.title: CancelProposal
anyOf.description: Author or committee cancels

anyOf.title: CastProposalVote
anyOf.description: Cast a vote on a Published proposal

anyOf.title: ResolveProposal
anyOf.description: Resolve after voting deadline

alexandria/types/ReputationDatum.title: ReputationDatum
alexandria/types/ReputationDatum.description:
The reputation datum stored in the CIP-68 reference NFT's inline datum.
 One token per (subject, role), with skill-level detail in the skills list.

fields.title: owner
fields.description: Owner's verification key hash (the user whose reputation this is)

fields.title: subject_id
fields.description: Subject identifier (16-byte UUID matching the asset name prefix)

alexandria/types/ReputationMintRedeemer.title: ReputationMintRedeemer
alexandria/types/ReputationMintRedeemer.description: Redeemer for the CIP-68 reputation minting policy.

anyOf.title: MintReputation
anyOf.description: Mint a new (100) reference + (222) wallet receipt pair

anyOf.title: BurnReputation
anyOf.description: Burn both tokens (on revocation)

alexandria/types/SkillScore.title: SkillScore
alexandria/types/SkillScore.description: A single skill-level reputation score within the aggregated datum.

fields.title: skill_id
fields.description: Skill identifier (16-byte UUID, same as in the API DB)

fields.title: impact_score
fields.description: Impact score scaled by 10^6 (avoids floats on-chain)

fields.title: evidence_count
fields.description: Number of evidence records backing this score

alexandria/types/SoulboundRedeemer.title: SoulboundRedeemer
alexandria/types/SoulboundRedeemer.description: Redeemer for the soulbound spending script that locks reputation tokens.

anyOf.title: UpdateReputation
anyOf.description:
Update the datum (reputation changed). Output must return to same
 script address with same owner. Requires authorized_minter OR owner.

anyOf.title: RevokeReputation
anyOf.description: Burn/revoke the token. Requires authorized_minter signature.

alexandria/types/StakePubkeyRegistration.title: StakePubkeyRegistrationDatum
alexandria/types/StakePubkeyRegistration.description:
On-chain attestation that a stake address has bound itself to a
 specific Ed25519 public key for gossip-envelope signing.

 Posted as an inline datum on a UTXO sent to the `stake_pubkey_registration`
 script address. The script is intentionally immutable (always fails on
 spend) — to invalidate a binding the issuer publishes a new
 registration with a non-overlapping validity window.

 Security is anchored off-chain: the verifier scanning the registry
 address rejects any entry whose creating transaction is NOT signed
 by the claimed `stake_key_hash` (`tx.extra_signatories`).

 Mirrors the SQLite `stake_pubkey_registry` schema (migration 052)
 and the Rust types in `src-tauri/src/p2p/registry.rs`.

fields.title: stake_key_hash
fields.description:
Blake2b-224 hash of the stake key being registered. The off-chain
 reader recomputes this from the bech32 stake address (`stake1u…`)
 and matches it against the tx witness set.

fields.title: public_key
fields.description: The 32-byte Ed25519 public key the stake address is bound to.

fields.title: valid_from
fields.description: POSIX seconds — start of the binding's validity window.

fields.title: valid_until
fields.description: POSIX seconds — end of the window, or 0 for an open-ended binding.

anyOf.title: MintReceipt
anyOf.description: Mint when casting a vote

anyOf.title: BurnReceipt
anyOf.description: Burn after finalization

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

challenge_escrow/ChallengeEscrowDatum.title: ChallengeEscrowDatum
challenge_escrow/ChallengeEscrowDatum.description: Inline datum locked alongside the staked ADA.

fields.title: challenger
fields.description: Challenger's payment key hash — recipient on `Refund`.

fields.title: treasury
fields.description: DAO treasury payment key hash — recipient on `Forfeit`.

fields.title: dao_authority
fields.description: DAO committee key authorised to settle this escrow.

fields.title: challenge_id
fields.description:
Hash of the challenge id this stake backs (binds the UTxO to one
 challenge so it can't be replayed against another).
